build_system: Gradle with Kotlin DSL (build.gradle.kts), compileSdk 34, Compose BOM 2024.06.00, Kotlin compiler extension 1.5.14
test_framework: JUnit 4 + Espresso + Compose UI testing (not heavily used in this project)
build_command: Cannot build in sandbox (no Android SDK). Use AST/syntax validation via kotlinc or grep-based verification.
test_command: N/A - no Android SDK in sandbox
verification_instructions: Verify code compiles syntactically: check imports are correct, no unresolved references, no obvious type mismatches. Verify logic is correct by reviewing the code paths.
setup_instructions: N/A - Android project, no build possible in sandbox
environment_constraints: No Android SDK available in sandbox. Cannot run gradle build or tests. Must rely on code correctness verification through code review, import checking, and pattern adherence. Network is OPEN_INTERNET so we can fetch web resources if needed.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing code patterns. Use Compose Material3 APIs. Use existing color theme (MysticGold, MysticPurple, TextSecondary, etc). Use existing component patterns (MysticButton, MysticCard, MysticTextField).
key_patterns: ViewModel pattern with StateFlow. Repository pattern with Result<T>. Coil AsyncImage for images. RetrofitInstance.IMAGE_BASE_URL for image URLs. Material3 composables. NavController navigation.
directory_structure: MysticNusa/app/src/main/java/com/mysticnusa/app/ contains: data/ (models, remote, repository, local), ui/ (screens, viewmodels, components, theme, util). resources/views/ contains Blade PHP templates for the web version reference.
